name: thomassloboda.github.io
description: Static personal website for Thomas SLOBODA

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html index.js styles.css service-worker.js manifest.json CNAME _config.yml "Thomas SLOBODA - Hands-on Tech Lead · Fullstack JavaScript · Automation & AI.md" dist && cp -R assets dist/assets && cp -R .well-known dist/.well-known
